message:
fix(cli,db,server): e2e runner improvements, S3-FIFO cache fix, query and dashboard fixes

- e2e_runner: refactor run_suite_once to use suite.script_path, pass
  E2E_PROJECT_ROOT and AM_E2E_KEEP_TMP env vars, iterate config.env
  map for extra env vars; separate output capture setup for clarity
- cache: bump hit loop in test from 3 to 8 iterations to exceed
  HIT_WRITE_MAINTENANCE_INTERVAL and actually trigger freq promotion
  in S3-FIFO write-side maintenance path
- queries: drop connection before transition_atc_experience call to
  avoid holding a connection across an operation that acquires its own
- dashboard: switch to_ascii_lowercase → to_lowercase in
  parse_query_terms and event_entry_search_key for full Unicode support
- tests: add s3fifo_bug.rs regression test for S3-FIFO cache eviction bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
